name: Zucchini and Mushroom Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Clean the mushrooms.
2. Cut the zucchini into 1-inch lengths.
3. Place all ingredients in a pot.
4. Simmer until the zucchini is just tender.
5. Turn off the heat and place the lid on the pot.
6. Leave for 15 minutes.
7. Remove the drained vegetables from the pot and place them in a bowl, reserving the cooking liquid.
8. Return the reserved cooking liquid to the pot and simmer until reduced to about 1/3 cup.
9. Discard the tarragon sprigs.
10. Pour the reduced liquid over the vegetables and lightly chill (do not over-chill).
11. Garnish with finely chopped parsley before serving.
